headline: Truist announces redemption of senior notes due May 2027
summary: Truist Bank (NYSE: TFC) today announced it will redeem all $1,250,000,000 principal amount outstanding of its fixed-to-floating rate senior notes due May 20, 2027, (CUSIP 89788JAE9) on the redemption date of May 20, 2026.

headline: How The Bank Of America (BAC) Investment Story Is Shifting As Analyst Views Rebalance
summary: Bank of America's fair value estimate has shifted to US$62.98 from US$62.72, a small price target adjustment that reflects fine tuning rather than a wholesale change in view. This move sits against a backdrop of mixed Street commentary, with some analysts lifting targets by US$1 to US$6 while others are trimming by as much as US$10 and even removing the stock from a US Conviction List. Read on to see what is driving these cross currents and how you can follow the evolving narrative around the...

headline: Truist is Bullish on Cimpress plc (CMPR)
summary: Cimpress plc (NASDAQ:CMPR) is one of the 8 Best European Industrial Stocks to Buy Now. On May 1, 2026, Truist hiked its price target on Cimpress plc (NASDAQ:CMPR) to $110 from $100. headline: How The Story Is Shifting For Strategic Education (STRA) After Mixed Earnings And Target Cuts
summary: The core valuation framework for Strategic Education is largely intact, with the model fair value holding steady at US$87.0, even as published price targets in recent research have been trimmed by mid single digit dollar amounts. Those target cuts line up with analysts reacting to mixed Q4 trends, where weaker US enrollment sat alongside an EBITDA beat supported by cost controls and AI related efficiencies. Read on to see how this tug of war between enrollment risk and margin progress is...
